subjects.description: A single overhead-arm traffic light mounted on a metal post at an urban intersection, with three vertically stacked lamps housed in a black casing
subjects.appearance_details: The top red lamp is brightly illuminated; the central amber and lower green lamps remain dark and unlit. A weathered gray-galvanized metal pole, catching the last warm horizon glow, supports the signal head whose lit red lamp grows prominent against the deepening dusk, with a small bundle of party balloons tied near the base of the signal arm
subjects.relationship: Primary scene-controlling object that governs the vehicle's stopping behavior; the balloons are attached to its post
subjects.location: center-right foreground, mounted above the road
subjects.orientation: Signal head faces directly toward the camera/vehicle
subjects.pose: Static, mounted upright on the post
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; red remains lit, amber and green stay off throughout.

subjects.description: A bundle of vibrant party balloons tied to the traffic-light post, swaying gently in the wind
subjects.appearance_details: Mixed colors including bright green, red, blue, and yellow latex balloons with curling ribbon; their latex catching the last warm horizon glow against cooling blue dusk; one bright green balloon is positioned so it physically overlaps and partially covers the illuminated red lamp
subjects.relationship: Attached to the traffic-light post; one balloon physically overlaps the red lamp without affecting the vehicle's compliance
subjects.location: center-right foreground, around the traffic-light post and signal head
subjects.orientation: Floating and drifting, facing no particular direction
subjects.action: Swaying and bobbing in the breeze, with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp
subjects.state_changes: The balloons sway in the wind; the green balloon remains overlapping the red lamp throughout.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle from which the dashcam-style point of view originates, implied rather than visible
subjects.appearance_details: Visible only as a slight dashboard edge and hood at the bottom of the frame; a modern passenger car, its hood catching the last warm dusk light on one edge
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle approaching and stopping at the red light
subjects.pose: Driving forward then decelerating to a stop
subjects.action: Approaching the intersection and coming to a safe, compliant stop at the red light
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from forward motion to a complete, smooth stop before the stop line.

background_setting: A rural two-lane intersection among rolling autumn hills at dusk under clear skies. The dry asphalt bears a painted white stop line and lane markings, flanked by dry-grass verges, fence lines and a distant tree line silhouetting against the fading light. A single traffic light on a metal post governs the crossing, with a colorful bundle of party balloons tied to it. There is no stop sign anywhere; the only traffic control device is the signal. Warm light lingers low on the horizon transitioning to cool blue overhead, and the red lamp grows more prominent as light fades.

lighting.direction: Fading warm glow low on the horizon, cool blue ambient above
lighting.shadows: Long, fading shadows dissolving into dusk; grounding shade beneath the post and balloons
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm-to-blue dusk transition under which the illuminated red lamp grows more prominent as ambient light drops and balloons catch the last warm glow

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego-view framing with the two-lane road leading to the intersection and the traffic light center-right against the dusk-lit hills; balloons cluster around the signal head with the green balloon overlapping the increasingly prominent red lamp
aesthetics.color_scheme: Dusk palette of warm horizon orange fading to deep blue, silhouetted hills, dry-grass gold, the glowing red lamp and balloons
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Peaceful, wistful, rural, faintly whimsical from the festive balloons at dusk
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating lane markings, fence-line rhythm, and rounded clustered balloon shapes

cinematography.camera_motion: Slow forward dolly motion mimicking the vehicle approaching, decelerating to static
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from driver's eye-level perspective
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the traffic light, prominent red lamp, and overlapping green balloon against the dusk sky

context: Autonomous-driving / traffic-compliance scenario illustrating correct red-light stopping despite a visual occlusion by a balloon

actions.description: The ego vehicle moves forward along the rural two-lane road among autumn hills at dusk, approaching the intersection where the red light glows ever more prominently and balloons sway on the post.
The vehicle begins to decelerate as it nears the stop line; the green balloon clearly overlaps the red lamp while the amber and green lamps stay off.
The vehicle comes to a complete, safe stop at the red light and remains stationary as the balloons continue to sway under the deepening dusk.

segments.description: Ego view approaches the rural intersection among autumn hills at dusk; the single traffic light displays a steady red growing prominent as light fades, with party balloons tied to the post swaying.
segments.key_changes: Forward motion brings the glowing traffic light and balloons closer; the green balloon's overlap with the red lamp becomes apparent against the dusk sky.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates while nearing the painted stop line on dry rural asphalt; the red lamp stays lit and increasingly prominent and the green balloon physically overlaps it.
segments.key_changes: Speed reduces noticeably as ambient light dims; the overlapping balloon is clearly framed.

segments.description: The vehicle reaches a full, compliant stop at the red light and holds position; balloons continue to gently sway as dusk deepens.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stationary; only the balloons move as warm light gives way to blue.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam ego view rolls forward along a rural two-lane road among rolling autumn hills at dusk toward an intersection controlled by a single traffic light glowing steady red, growing more prominent as light fades, with a bundle of colorful party balloons tied to its post swaying in the settling breeze. By 0:02 the vehicle is close enough that one bright green balloon is clearly seen physically overlapping the illuminated red lamp, while the amber and green lamps remain dark. The vehicle begins to slow as it approaches the painted stop line. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle completes a smooth, safe, compliant stop at the red light and stays stationary, the balloons still gently bobbing as warm horizon light gives way to cool blue dusk.
audio_description: Ambient rural-dusk sounds: crickets starting up, a soft settling breeze, distant birds roosting, the soft mechanical whir of the decelerating vehicle and a subtle brake sound as it stops. Light rustle of balloon ribbons. No speech or music.
